Class JavaSourceUtils

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.JavaSourceUtils
public class JavaSourceUtils extends Object
Shared utilities for NetBeans Java Source (AST) operations.

Provides surgical helper methods for element resolution, tree handle management, and Javadoc manipulation using the NetBeans Java Source API.

Author:
anahata

    private static boolean
    matchSignature(org.netbeans.api.java.source.CompilationInfo info, ExecutableElement ee, String methodFqn)
    Internal helper to match a method element against a string signature.
    static String
    normalizeFqn(String fqn)
    Normalizes an Anahata FQN (which uses '$' for inner classes) to a standard Java FQN (using '.') for compatibility with standard APIs.
    private static List<String>
    splitParameters(String params)
    Splits a parameter string into individual types, respecting generic brackets.

    • CANONICAL_FQN_STANDARD

      public static final String CANONICAL_FQN_STANDARD
      The authoritative identification standard for all Anahata Java toolkits.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • JavaSourceUtils

      public JavaSourceUtils()

  • Method Details

    • getCanonicalFqn

      public static String getCanonicalFqn(Element e)
      Generates the Anahata Canonical FQN for a given element.
      Parameters:
      e - The element to resolve.
      Returns:
      The canonical FQN string.

    • getCanonicalFqn

      public static String getCanonicalFqn(TypeMirror m)
      Generates the Anahata Canonical FQN for a given type mirror.
      Parameters:
      m - The type mirror to resolve.
      Returns:
      The canonical FQN string.

    • getParentFqn

      public static String getParentFqn(String memberFqn)
      Extracts the parent FQN (Class or Outer Class) from a member or nested type FQN.
      Parameters:
      memberFqn - The FQN to parse.
      Returns:
      The parent FQN.

    • getMemberSimpleName

      public static String getMemberSimpleName(String memberFqn)
      Extracts the simple name of a member or nested type from an FQN.
      Parameters:
      memberFqn - The FQN to parse.
      Returns:
      The simple name (e.g., 'myMethod' or 'InnerClass').

    • getFileObject

      public static org.openide.filesystems.FileObject getFileObject(String filePath) throws AgiToolException
      Resolves a FileObject for the given absolute path.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path to the file.
      Returns:
      The corresponding FileObject.
      Throws:
      AgiToolException - If the file does not exist or cannot be resolved.

    • normalizeFqn

      public static String normalizeFqn(String fqn)
      Normalizes an Anahata FQN (which uses '$' for inner classes) to a standard Java FQN (using '.') for compatibility with standard APIs.
      Parameters:
      fqn - The FQN to normalize.
      Returns:
      The normalized FQN.

    • findTree

      public static Tree findTree(org.netbeans.api.java.source.CompilationInfo info, String memberFqn)
      Locates a syntax tree node inside the compilation context matching the given FQN.
      Parameters:
      info - The compilation context.
      memberFqn - The canonical FQN of the member to find.
      Returns:
      The matching Tree node, or null if not found.

    • matchSignature

      private static boolean matchSignature(org.netbeans.api.java.source.CompilationInfo info, ExecutableElement ee, String methodFqn)
      Internal helper to match a method element against a string signature.

      This implementation is erasure-aware. If the provided signature does not contain generics, it will match against the raw AST type.

      Parameters:
      info - The compilation context.
      ee - The executable element to match.
      methodFqn - The signature to compare against.
      Returns:
      true if the signature matches, false otherwise.

    • splitParameters

      private static List<String> splitParameters(String params)
      Splits a parameter string into individual types, respecting generic brackets.
      Parameters:
      params - The raw parameters string.
      Returns:
      A list of individual parameter types.

    • findMemberCandidates

      public static List<String> findMemberCandidates(org.netbeans.api.java.source.CompilationInfo info, String memberFqn)
      Generates a list of canonical candidate FQNs for a given partial member name. Use this when a resolution fails to provide helpful feedback.
      Parameters:
      info - CompilationInfo.
      memberFqn - The FQN that failed resolution.
      Returns:
      A list of valid canonical FQNs that share the same base name.

    • handleSave

      public static void handleSave(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo) throws IOException
      Forces the IDE to save and flush any open document buffers for the given file.
      Parameters:
      fo - The NetBeans file object to save.
      Throws:
      IOException - If saving fails.
